fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor number. The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company name for the order address.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact when you do business with this vendor at this address.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number that is associated with the order address.

fields.name: Telex No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the telex number that is associated with the order address. You can enter a maximum of 30 characters, both numbers and letters.
Use a standard format for the telex number so that it will look uniform on printouts.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when this order address was last modified.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fax number associated with the order address.

fields.name: Telex Answer Back
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the telex answer back code that is associated with the order address. You can enter a maximum of 20 characters, both numbers and letters.
Use a standard format for the telex answer back code so that it will look uniform on printouts.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county of the address.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the email address associated with the order address.
